taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, General Software Engineer
core_skills: Golang, Java, Python, Source control management, Linux development
skill_match_scores: Golang:1.0, Java:1.0, Python:1.0, Source control management:1.0, Linux development:0.0
must_have_quals: Ability to work with new and fast-changing technologies with a high level of uncertainty, reacting to changes in requirements quickly, Strong problem-solving skills, with a passion for learning and adapting to new challenges, Bachelor's degree in Computer science or equivalent working experience, At least 4 years of experience writing code in Golang, JAVA, or Python, Experience working on shared codebases using source control management (SCM) systems like GitHub or GitLab, Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and ability to work effectively in a team-oriented environment, Experience working with Linux as a developer, Experience with building & debugging applications on Kubernetes clusters, Experience building and running containerized applications and controllers, Experience with cloud-based infrastructure (e.g., AWS) and microservices architecture
preferred_quals: Experience with IBM cloud, Experience in Terraform, Experience in Tekton, Experience in CD tools, e.g. ArgoCD, Experience building CICD pipelines, Experience in Observability tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, Splunk, Experience in Open Source development, Experience defining requirements between application components, Experience in DevSecOps or Product Security, Experience with OpenShift
core_responsibilities: Lead the design, development, and implementation of software components, systems, and sub-features, Collaborate with cross-functional teams on deliverables to improve system performance and functionality, Exercise good judgment and work with minimal instruction to resolve moderately complex technical issues
job_summary: Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community-powered approach to deliver high-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. The Senior Software Engineer will lead the design, development, and implementation of software components while collaborating with cross-functional teams to improve system performance and functionality.
